zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton於大約1292年出生在英國爾阿爾德福德時，她的父親Peter de Arderne52歲，母親Margery Elleforde48歲。她於大約1325年與William de Wasteneys在英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年在英國享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton于大约1292年出生在英国爾阿爾德福德时，她的父亲Peter de Arderne52岁，母亲Margery Elleforde48岁。她于大约1325年与William de Wasteneys在英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年在英国享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton was born about 1292, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, her father, Peter de Arderne, was 52 and her mother, Margery Elleforde, was 48. She married William de Wasteneys about 1325, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1356, in England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton est née environ 1292, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Arderne, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margery Elleforde, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé William de Wasteneys environ 1325, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1356, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton um 1292 in Aldford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter de Arderne 52 und ihre Mutter Margery Elleforde 48. Sie hat um 1325 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William de Wasteneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1356 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton è nata il circa 1292 nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Peter de Arderne, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Margery Elleforde, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato William de Wasteneys circa 1325, nel Alvanley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1356, nel England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Arderne Lady of Eltonが約1292年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父Peter de Arderneは52歳，母Margery Ellefordeは48歳であった。約1325年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーでWilliam de Wasteneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年にイギリスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Arderne(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Elleforde(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 앨반리에서 William de Wasteneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 영국에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Arderne, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margery Elleforde, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Wasteneys aproximadamente 1325, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1356, em Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton родилась около 1292 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de Arderne было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Elleforde, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Wasteneys около 1325 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1356 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton nació aproximadamente 1292, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Arderne, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Margery Elleforde, tenía 48 años. Se casó con William de Wasteneys aproximadamente 1325, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1356, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
